name: Straw and Hay
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, bring 2 quarts water to a rolling boil. Add pastas.
2. Cook, uncovered, for 8 minutes until the pasta is al dente.
3. Add mushrooms, peas, and green onion. Continue cooking for 4 to 5 more minutes until vegetables are just tender.
4. Drain well.
5. Meanwhile, prepare cheese sauce: In a saucepan, combine milk, cornstarch, salt, nutmeg, and pepper. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly (2 minutes).
6. Add Parmesan cheese and ham. Stir to combine.
7. Toss pasta mixture with cheese sauce to coat evenly.
8. Makes 6 side-dish servings.
